query:
SELECT q.id, q.claim_id, q.quoted_amount, q.labor_cost, q.parts_cost, q.status,
       COUNT(li.id) as line_item_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN li.category = 'parts' THEN li.line_total ELSE 0 END) as parts_total,
       SUM(CASE WHEN li.category = 'labor' THEN li.line_total ELSE 0 END) as labour_total,
       SUM(li.line_total) as line_items_total
FROM panel_beater_quotes q
LEFT JOIN quote_line_items li ON li.quote_id = q.id
WHERE q.claim_id IN (SELECT id FROM claims WHERE claim_number = 'KGA-2010001' OR id = 2640001)
GROUP BY q.id, q.claim_id, q.quoted_amount, q.labor_cost, q.parts_cost, q.status
LIMIT 10;
